title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 175.070 - Control of agricultural school at Dalton, Missouri, transferred to Lincoln University board of curators
text:
175.070.  Control of agricultural school at Dalton, Missouri, transferred to Lincoln University board of curators. — The board of curators for Lincoln University shall take over and conduct the demonstration farm and agricultural school as now established at Dalton, Missouri, and the supervision and control of the school is hereby invested in the board of curators for the Lincoln University.
(RSMo 1939 § 10780, A. 1949 S.B. 1047, A.L. 1965 p. 306) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 9623
